name: Hadanite
description: Hadanite is a pinkish purple colored mineral found in small-scale rock deposits. Some deposits can be mined with a handheld mining tool, while others need at least the power of a size 0 mining laser. It can be found on both planetary surfaces or attached to asteroids. == Description == == Harvest locations == == Trade data == == Gallery == == Development == == Trivia == During PTU Alpha 3.15.0 there was a bug that allow players turn dropped ore into a mining node. == References ==

name: Janalite
description: Janalite is an extremely rare and valuable mineral found in small-scale rock deposits. == Description == == Trade data == == Harvest locations == == Gallery == == Development == == References ==

name: Quantanium
description:
Quantanium (Raw) is a volatile mineral that can be mined from asteroids or ore deposits and be refined into quantanium. Raw quantanium  degrades over time and must be deposited at a refinery deck or it will explode violently.

name: Dolivine
description: Dolivine is a green colored mineable gemstone. == Description == == Trade data == == Harvest locations == == Lore == Dolivine came to prominence as a gemstone after Imperator Illyana Messer VI wore a 45 carat dolivine brooch to her niece Astrid’s wedding in 2690. == Gallery == == Development == == See also == Mining == References ==
